zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前比特币价格位于62588.14美元附近，较20日均线SMA(20)63415.13美元下方运行，显示短期价格承压。价格在日内高低点63383.84与62514.75之间波动，整体呈现小幅回落的整理格局，短期趋势偏弱但未出现明显破位。  

MACD指标显示-412.31且无信号线确认，表明动能偏空，卖压仍存在，但未出现极端超卖状态。缺乏RSI参考，需要结合均线及价格形态观察支撑阻力。20日均线作为近期阻力位，同时近期低点62500美元附近可视作短线支撑区域。  

交易上建议谨慎操作，短线可关注低吸机会，但避免追高。若价格跌破62500美元支撑，则可能触发进一步回调至62000美元附近。反之，如能重返SMA(20)上方，则可考虑轻仓做多，但需严格止损控制风险。  

总体来看，比特币短期仍以震荡偏弱为主，技术面提示卖方略占上风，操作策略应以防守为主，等待明确趋势确认后再布局多单，避免盲目追涨或过度加仓。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading at 62,588.14 after a 1.11% decline over the past 24 hours, maintaining a short-term bearish tone. The price remains below the 20-period simple moving average at 63,415.13, suggesting sellers currently retain control of momentum. The session range between 62,514.75 and 63,383.84 highlights relatively tight trading conditions, indicating that market participants are waiting for a stronger catalyst before committing to a directional move.

Technical indicators lean negative despite incomplete momentum data. The MACD reading of -412.31 reflects bearish momentum and confirms that downside pressure has been building in recent sessions. While the RSI value is unavailable, price action below the SMA(20) and the negative MACD combination typically signals weakening bullish conviction. Unless buyers reclaim the moving average decisively, rallies may continue to face resistance and attract profit-taking activity.

Key support is located near the recent low of 62,515, with additional downside interest likely emerging around the psychological 62,000 level. A break below these areas could expose Bitcoin to a deeper retracement toward the 61,000 region. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near 63,384, followed by the SMA(20) around 63,415. A sustained move above this zone would improve the technical outlook and potentially open the door to a recovery toward 64,000–64,500.

For traders, caution remains appropriate while price trades beneath short-term resistance. Conservative participants may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above 63,415 before considering bullish positions. More aggressive traders could monitor support around 62,500 for potential rebound opportunities, provided risk is tightly controlled with stop-loss protection below recent lows. Until momentum indicators improve, the broader short-term bias remains neutral-to-bearish, with preservation of capital taking priority over chasing uncertain price swings.
